title: YTP: National Pingas Radio
description:
I've never seen NPR used in a YouTube Poop, which is surprising given how many hours of transcribed, freely-downloadable audio they have.

Also please don't interpret any edits as my commentary on issues discussed in the source material (unless you agree with the commentary, in which case it's fine)

Sources:
    • Fresh Air Nov. 3rd, 2021: Paul McCartney
    • Up First Nov. 1st, 2021: UN Climate Summit
    • Up First Oct 26th, 2021: Ex-Envoy On Afghanistan Exit
    • The Indicator from Planet Money Oct 19th, 2021: Labor market trick or treat
